## What needs to be done

A clear description of the maintenance task.

## Why

Reason this work is needed (security patch, performance, code health, etc.).

## Scope

Files, modules, or areas of the codebase affected.

## Definition of done

- [ ] ...
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
